summary:
POLITICAL THEATER AND PRESIDENTIAL WARNINGS: Brandon shares that 2026 will bring increased global political theater. He describes a vision involving Donald Trump at a black-tie event, where a blonde woman in a sequined dress approaches him. Brandon emphasizes the need to pray over Trump's liquid consumptions, drinks, and overall health during his foreign travels, stating he explicitly ignores current media conspiracies regarding staged events.

ECONOMIC VISIONS AND FINANCIAL INSTABILITY: Brandon recounts a vision of a massive horse syringe filled with green bio-acid sludge, representing a coming economic injection. He sees Trump navigating a toxic economy in a yellow caution-style life raft while rockets launch toward a toxic Cuba. Brandon reflects on past visions of a shallow, short-lived economic wave yielding limited gold, and anticipates a 1929-style crash. He notes a vision of officials, including the head of the Fed, strategizing a $2,500 per household stimulus to prevent a blue political wave, while skyscrapers and the housing market melt into a green sludge that produces a black oil slick. He also observes Trump playing a poker hand of red hearts, contrasted with Putin holding black diamonds and waiting to take Ukraine.

GLOBAL PLAGUES AND DISEASES: Brandon describes a vision of a genetically modified AI super-disease created in a Chinese laboratory. He details that this disease, engineered using elements of COVID-19, is tested on rats and released in Europe, causing victims' faces to visibly fade away. Brandon warns this plague will be significantly worse than the Black Plague and will lack a vaccine.

INFRASTRUCTURE AND ENVIRONMENTAL CRISES: Brandon mentions visions of rusting trade boats from China and notes a series of global oil refinery explosions across locations like Texas, Australia, Russia, India, and Iraq. He links these events to his repeated warnings to pray over pipelines in the Gulf region. Additionally, Brandon highlights a severe drought in Colorado, noting the intentional draining of the shallow Antero Reservoir by Denver Water, which will result in the death of millions of fish.

SPIRITUAL WARFARE AND END TIMES REVIVAL: Brandon recounts seeing Satan and demonic principalities holding a meeting to strategize against an impending global revival. He describes visions of a massive black widow spider wrapping the First Amendment and entities resembling cats with glowing eyes recording accurate prophecies. Brandon foresees the birthing of new harvest churches across South America, Africa, and Tennessee, and mentions an acceleration of spiritual growth and the breaking of generational addictions among believers.

ESCHATOLOGICAL TIMELINES AND GEOPOLITICS: Brandon predicts an accelerated rollout of a beast system and mentions future oil drilling plans in Venezuela, Gaza, and the Mediterranean. He foresees rapid negotiations for a two-state solution and a peace agreement involving MBS and Jared Kushner, which will initiate a seven-year biblical timeline involving the third temple. Brandon explicitly marks the timeframe leading up to September 11, 2026, as a critical period of acceleration and geopolitical shifts.

FAITH AND BIBLICAL PROSPERITY: Brandon urges his audience to rely on biblical economics, emphasizing tithing, strategic giving, and avoiding spiritual shortcuts or network marketing schemes within the church. He stresses the importance of walking in love and references 1 Peter 3:7 to remind husbands to honor their wives to prevent hindered prayers. Brandon encourages believers to trust in divine provision, asserting they will inherit resources, wells, and vineyards they did not plant or build.
rawData: [April 28, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/7FG6qD91nZo]-[Well, good evening, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me again tonight. There is so much going on in this world right now. It is absolutely amazing. The increase of the birthing pains, political theater. Remember what the Lord said. 2026 will be a year of political theater. Great political theater will be across the land. Not just in America, but across the world. We are going to hear about a lot of political theater. And boy are we ever hearing a lot of political theater. I am going to go straight into the vision that I had last night because I believe it is going to take too long to explain a lot of what I believe the Lord showed us in prayer last night. It was very hard to get in that river. If you were here, I do not know if you are familiar with a lot of my other videos, but last night it was like I could only get my toes in and I was pushing as hard as I could, but even in worship, I was hitting a wall. But as I was praying, the Lord was talking to me and he started telling me. He said, Braden, is it still going? It is okay. I just wanted to make sure. It glitched. I just wanted to make sure. I thought our computer dropped this. Sorry y'all. Going over yesterday's vision and what the Lord showed us. So what I saw was a lot. It was like barely having your toes in. But as I was pushing against this, I could feel the current of where we are in the economy and where we are with President Trump and what is going on now. There are a lot of conspiracies going on right now about this being staged, the shooting and all that. I am not going to get into all that. I did not see it. I did not see last week, yesterday, day before, whatever it was. I did not see any of it. The Lord did not warn me. I feel like there is something funny. When I am praying over it and praying over our country, I feel an icky feeling. It does not feel like the warning that I received whenever it came to the ear or what I have received concerning Russia and Macron and things like that. Praying over other nations when he travels afar. This is major, major praying over him as he goes to foreign nations. That is what I am praying over. And the woman in the sequined dress, the blond-headed woman with the twist in her hair with a sequined dress on approaching him, coming out of an area, and he had a black tie event, praying over his goblets, his drinks, tea or whatever he is partaking of, praying over his liquid-based anything. The Lord said, Pray over his drinks. Praying over his health. That is more on me praying over that than anything that I have seen in the news lately. Everybody is talking about all this conspiracy and the ballroom and all that. Could it be? I do not know. As I said, there are so many rumors and things out there. You never know what is going on with any of it. All I know is I stick with what the Spirit of the Lord is telling me to do and to pray and how he is telling me to pray, and I leave all that stuff so Braden can study it. I do not have time for all that. I have to keep close to him, listening to him, and there is too much distraction. What I want to talk to you all about is the vision and what I saw. I saw a massive needle syringe. I saw a syringe that was not a normal doctor's visit, what you would go to the doctor and get a flu vaccination or something like that. It was a massive horse syringe, like a massive something, maybe something for an elephant. That is how big it was. But as I was looking, the needle was really big. So I knew this was a major injection coming. And the Lord said, This is about the economy. And I saw an injection coming for the economy. But as I was looking into what was in the vaccination, this shot, it was green sludge. It was green, moving liquid that was not thick. It was a thin liquid like a vaccination liquid. And it was moving, but it looked like acid, like an acid, a green bio-acid, some kind of something. But as I was watching, President Trump was on a life raft. And he was bouncing around in this life raft that was made out of a yellow kind of material that looked like caution, like you would see a caution, a yield or a caution sign. I could see it had black stripes around it and he was sitting in the middle of the raft with two of those paddles. His cheeks had red coloring, like a blush, like you are blushing, like you got humiliated on his cheeks. It was very detailed, bright colors. His suit was always pressed just like it always is. He looked very nice. He had his thing, but he looked cartoonish. And as I was watching him paddling in this boat, rockets were shooting out at Cuba. I saw rockets coming out of this and I saw Cuba in the horizon. Cuba looked very toxic. I saw the economy, and just like I have always told you, booming, but it was toxic. People say, Well, Brandon, you said you have seen visions of everything getting better. Everything is going to be okay for a season. This is contradicting what you saw. No, I said it lasts for a window. I saw a stimulus. I saw a wave that would be short-lived that brought gold all over the ground. And as the gold was thin, the Lord said, Put it all in your pockets because it will not last long. Figure out what you are supposed to do with it, listening to me. The gold was thin. The wave was shallow. Do you remember I told you all this? And through the wave I could see it. It was transparent looking. It was very transparent. It was not like the deeper wave in the ocean, the Pacific Ocean where they ride the waves. It is very dark blue. But whenever you are on the shore of the Caribbean, the shallower the water, the more you can see through the wave. So this wave that I saw in times past had crypto and investments and things like that and it was at a breaking point and the Lord said, Ride the wave for it will not last long. And I saw the gold on the seashore after it crashed. I saw people scooping it up and putting it in their pockets and putting it in buckets, whatever they could do to get a hold of this, but it was not enough to last a long time. It was just surface, right? So, what did we see last night? All the visions go with each other. They do not deviate from each other. They are just a different lens, a different angle, a different picture, but all of them do not go against each other. They all flow together. What is amazing is what the Holy Spirit does, because every single thing is always a warning of what I told you when I saw his ear. I saw a great 1929 style crash coming. But as he humbled himself and started praying in the Oval Office, I saw a darkness upon the land. And as Trump gave his heart over, he was weeping before the Lord. He comes to a breaking point in the Oval Office. I saw certain ministers praying in the Oval Office. They were all pacing the floor, praying in tongues. President Trump had an encounter. There was something that happened. I saw a plague coming. You remember I have told you, worse than the Black Plague of death. Worse. It is a genetically modified, genetic AI disease that is created in a laboratory that they take part of COVID. They take parts of things that they find in the genetic makeup of these old diseases and they splice them together and they make it where it is even more effective against people on diabetic medicine, heart medicine, all kinds of different things. Who did it? It was China. I'm telling you, I saw them in a lab and they were creating this super thing that would not have a vaccine for it. I said they will release it. They said that last time they experimented, I saw bats. The Lord said, 'This is rats,' and I saw them injecting rats and they released them in Europe. The rats had red eyes and they released this, and as it was spreading through Europe, it started to fade the face of whoever was in that country. It was kind of faded out, and as they started to spread the virus all throughout, it looked like red and the face faded away, like it was in Back to the Future whenever Marty McFly was trying to save his brothers and sisters and they faded away, and he was singing 'Johnny B. Goode' up on the stage playing his guitar just like that. But it was fading away. As I was looking at the visions in the past and what the Lord was showing me with this one, President Trump was praying and I saw a major darkness, but it lifted above the trees barely because of the prayers. In 2020, I saw all the visions that I have seen and the Lord said, 'I'm giving you more time.' I saw four major oak trees. They were all perfect, beautiful, huge oak trees. A lady was telling the weather; she was in a red, white, and blue outfit and she was forecasting the weather. All of a sudden, out of nowhere, it became very cold and all the leaves fell off the trees. These are the visions that I've had in the past. All of a sudden, I saw a 1929-style crash all across the trees and people looked dingy and dirty. The first two trees were not too bad, but the last ones were really bad. Then I saw a plug getting plugged into a 220. An old amplifier 1950s microphone came up out of the plug and amplified the trees and they all started to glow as the plug plugged the trees in, and an amplified gospel came from the microphone. Oral Roberts used to preach from one of them and I saw the trees begin to glow. That was another vision. That was a whole prayer time one night. So, we're going back to the L.A. yesterday. I'm trying to tell you my visions don't deviate from themselves. They're all the same warning; they're all a different way you can look at it. As I saw President Trump in this, I saw boats. I saw the boats coming from China. I saw trade wars. I saw the boats beginning to rust. I saw the boats beginning to disintegrate in the acid. There was something wrong. I saw crypto moving around inside of the acid. I could see dollar signs all moving around in this acid. Trump had cards in his hand. He was playing poker. But what I am ignorant about is what is a good hand, because I thought it wasn't a good hand that he had. He was playing poker, but they were all of the same suit—all hearts—so he had a flush, which I found out through my wife after the video is over that that is a good hand. I don't play poker, so I don't know what's good and what's bad. I don't know anything about cards. I'm looking at it and I'm thinking that's not good to have all hearts. They're all red cards. What's that mean? It is symbolic for something. He had red cards, all red suits in his hand, and they were all hearts and he was looking at them. Putin—remember that one?—had all diamonds, black cards, and he was looking at it and he said, 'I just have to wait you out and then your turn will be over. I just have to wait for you to leave and I'm going to take all of Ukraine.' He was playing poker, buying time because President Trump's term is only two and a half more years if we pray for him to stay in, because I saw the 25th Amendment, the 13th Amendment, and the First Amendment. And with the lady that passed away, there was a big spider last night. I saw a massive black widow again, but this time it had doubled, then tripled in size from what was wrapping the First Amendment. I saw a black widow again last night, which is a bad spider. Some people said, 'Well, that's representation of witchcraft.' All I know is this spider was wrapping things again last night. Okay. So, what was on Trump? He was holding a newspaper as he was floating in the acid and it had 0/0 and it said Income Tax Plan. He was studying it, but the fine print was too small. You couldn't read it all. The print on the newspaper was very, very fine. I mean, smaller than the print on this Brother Hagin book. He was looking at a newspaper and he was looking at income tax. There was something about incomes. Then I saw him fumbling around with this paper looking at it as I saw the man that's taking over the Fed got really big eyes realizing that the economy was in trouble. And I heard him say, 'We should already be calling a recession. They should already be saying it's a recession.' Now, I'm not a financial adviser and I don't know anything about a recession. So, don't be going Brandon, he's saying—I'm telling you what I saw in the vision. It could be off. We're all human. We can all miss it. So, we give grace to people and I'm going to ask you to give me grace. I'm just telling you what I saw. And if it's flesh and you say, 'Braden, I feel like that's pizza,' then we put it on a shelf and we keep praying. But I heard them talking. I could see them with a long table and they were talking and I saw.25. Then I heard them saying, 'We must stimulate the economy or we are going to have a landslide blue victory come November.' And I could hear them trying to strategize on how to stimulate the economy with this new guy that's coming, Jerome Powell. How do we stimulate the economy so we have more of a red buffer instead of a blue wave? How do we stop a blue wave from taking place in this nation? And I saw an idea being thrown around of $2,500 per person or maybe $2,500 per household. It's all coming quick. But I saw anybody who made over 150,000 didn't receive it. It was for people who had lower income. I saw a stimulation coming being discussed. Not saying it will happen; I saw it being discussed. How do we stimulate the economy? As I saw the housing market and the houses were melting in the green sludge. Big tall skyscrapers were melting in the sludge. And as they melted, they left a black oil slick all over the top of the sludge. It was oil. Some kind of substance, as they melted into the green, was all over this green and it was moving into the waves of it. As it was moving, it became a black substance. It looked like oil. So I saw plans of how to stimulate the economy. Now this is not financial advice. Again, this is not financial advice. This is a vision that I saw and it's all in my opinion. I saw Michael Saylor and I saw two times his wealth. I saw the Clarity Act negotiated. I saw Michael Saylor double. Now, that's just part of a vision. I'm not going to add to or take away from anything of that. I'm just telling you. So, I'm very cautious with this because you have a lot of immature people that will just take things and run with it and not pray over it. You must have yourself rooted in prayer and not be immature about what Michael Saylor—I don't even listen—Michael Saylor is an investment man. So, that's why I thought it was interesting what Michael Saylor does with his money to double it. I have no idea. I don't know his portfolio. All I know is he's an investment man. But I saw 2X. Then I saw Trump riding a donkey, and he had spurs on his feet and he was goading the side of that donkey and he had a hold of its ears. That donkey was braying with its mouth all open as it was bucking and acting nuts while Trump was riding that donkey. He was kicking its sides and he looked really heavy in this vision, which was interesting because that swayback donkey was bucking and bellowing. Trump had a hold of its ears and was pulling tight. It was actually kind of funny as I recall it. What is Trump riding a donkey for? Next, baseball. I saw a baseball hit a glass ceiling. It busted and it was stuck. Half the baseball was in it, half the baseball was out, but it was split all around. Then I saw Trump looking at a soccer ball that was cut in half, and there was a golden goose on it. As this golden goose started to sparkle, it shot down veins all inside of different nations, and the soccer ball began to glow with lights and looked golden. Trump was looking at it, very pleased. All I could see was his face, and he had the golden goose in his eyes. He was looking at it as it was spreading through half a soccer ball. I thought that was kind of interesting. There's nothing they can do to stop this. Talking about the economy, there's nothing they can do to stop this. The dollar's in the way for the digital age, the digital era. Because we know what the Bible says, a beast system will rise and the dollar is not the beast system. The dollar is the beginning of a means to an end. We are almost 40 trillion dollars in the hole. There are more people living off credit cards than we've ever seen before. A major refinery blew up last night in Texas because lightning hit it. That's kind of weird. In April, Australia had one. April 16th, Pakistan. April 18th, Russia. April 20th, India. Another one in Texas. April 20th, Romania. April 22nd, Erbil, Iraq. April 23rd, Russia again. April 25th, Vietnam. All our refineries worldwide are going up in flames. Then we had a gas leak in Louisiana, but it didn't blow up. Could that be a result of prayer? I believe so. We see these things blowing up worldwide, and it's just what the Lord warned us about in prayer. If you are a frequent flyer with Brandon on this prayer channel, you know what the Lord has warned us about praying over Tuttle, Oklahoma, Texas, and Louisiana, specifically the Gulf refineries. The Lord has warned us over and over again with very clear visions. Pray over the pipelines. We've been telling you for over two months since March, watch the pipelines, all these major refineries, and railroad cars. Look, that one got struck by lightning in Springtown, Texas. That might not be a big refinery; it looks like a housing complex. I don't know what this is. That's not a refinery. We have those oil tankers here. We're not trying to hype everything up; we're trying to show you what's really going on in the world. We see in part, and what the Lord is warning us now is to pray for our president for wisdom. We need to pray for him concerning what happened all of a sudden. Everyone is focused on what's going on with this crazy guy in the ballroom and Kash Patel and all these other people, but what's going on with Iran? What's happening with the mountain? That's where we are tonight, praying for President Trump for wisdom leading this nation. If he wants to stimulate the economy, let's ride the wave. I see a major plan coming out in Venezuela. They're going to say, 'drill, baby, drill.' I saw major refineries coming up in Gaza and major oil in the Mediterranean. Is it fair to blame Trump for the economy? No, that's not fair. Things have gone bad since COVID hit. Remember 'two weeks to stop the spread'? Everybody stay in your house and hide. Then Governor Stitt said enough's enough, and we went back to church. Remember Rodney Howard-Browne got thrown in jail because he said we're having church regardless. I see another one coming, but this one's not something to play with. COVID took a lot of lives, but this one will be COVID on steroids. And if we don't start taking our authority now and praying now, people will be like, "We're not going to shut down because we remember what happened." But this time, it's something that's a trap and it will be something that will shake the nations. I don't say all that to scare you; I say that to prepare you to pray so that you understand that we're in the end of the end. Jesus Christ is coming and the greatest revival is right on our front doorstep. And the enemy is going to try to do anything he can to stop it. He's not going to say... he's heard the prophetic words, everybody. Do you understand? The devil visits church more than you do. For a lot of you, he's in there listening to what's going on because he's trying to hear, because he doesn't hear what's going on in the spirit realm from the Father. The Lord's not talking to him; He's only talking to the prophetic voices. And He does nothing in the earth unless He reveals it to the prophetic voices first. That's what He said in His word. So when I told you I saw cats that looked like humans and they had little glowing eyes and they were writing down everything prophetic voices were saying that were accurate—not these false prophets—but they were writing down things that they knew they're only going to get by hearing a prophetic voice speak it out of his mouth because the Lord will only reveal it to the prophetic voices first. So they were listening for the echo. What is He saying? What's coming next? A revival? Oh, not on my watch. How do we stop it? So what did the Lord show us? I saw Satan and a bunch of demons—these massive principalities—have a plan, and they were having a meeting and they were strategizing. You know, Satan can't be everywhere at once; he's only in one place at a time. And I saw him strategizing on how they can try to overthrow and derail the revival in the days ahead. God has a bigger plan; Satan has a little plan. And we know who's defeated—Satan is, by the blood of the Lamb. But he still tries. He still roars like a lion, but he doesn't have any teeth. He is a roaring lion seeking whom he may devour, the Bible says. But I believe he doesn't have any teeth when it comes to me. Why? Because we've got the blood and I apply the blood. This is just a representation, right? I anoint my house and my family. We take communion and we do this often in remembrance of Him. What did He do for you? That's the bottom line. What did Jesus Christ do for you? He made it where you can walk in victory over the devil. But the only way you will know it is by knowing the Word of God. You will know the truth and the truth will set you free. That's the only thing that's going to set you free. There is no Trump going to set you free. There's no FBI going to set you free. There's no super preacher that's going to set you free. The only thing that's ever going to set you free is knowing who you are in Christ. And for whom the Son has set free is free indeed. And when you know for whom the Son has set free is free indeed, that's you; that's me. I'm a believing believer that's not a doubter, and I'm an overcomer by the blood. And that's why we do this. We take it every day. Smith Wigglesworth did. I said, "Well, if Smith Wigglesworth did it and he raised the dead and did all that he did, well, I'm going to do it, too." How often is often? Every day in my house, sometimes twice. And reading the Bible—we leak out, so we keep... Smith Wigglesworth would read his Bible every 15 to 30 minutes. He would pull it out of his jacket pocket and he would remain full. Even if it was just a couple of scriptures, we must remain full for the days ahead. If you think you can believe God right now for a million dollars, you say, "Well, I'm believing for a million dollars," but you don't have faith to believe for five. Start with one bite at a time. I'm believing God for five dollars. Believe for five dollars every day and watch it come to pass. Sow the seed. I'm believing God for a million already. Well, it's going from glory to glory to glory to glory. Don't bite off more than you can chew. Start with where your faith is at. Well, I'm at a million dollars. Have you believed for five dollars yet? We've got to be practical, and you sow your seed and you believe God for increase. Whatever you put your hands to will prosper. I believe in God-given miracles, ladies and gentlemen. I believe with all my heart, but I saw a lot of charismatic flakiness, too. And people always going out to the mailbox looking for their miracle, and they were always sitting on their blessed assurance doing nothing. Go out and put your boat into motion and do something with your hands, and God will bless whatever you put your hands to. But there's so many people with a welfare mentality thinking it's going to be given to them. And I believe that good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over will men give into our bosom. But I've seen it over and over again that God puts it in your hand, and it's what's in your hand that He will give the increase. But I've seen God give miracles. I've seen miracles. I lived in miracles with my mom and dad, and that happened when we were struggling and God provided that way, but it wasn't a way that we wanted to live all the time. When you go and you put your boat into motion, go to the place called "there." That's where the provision was. And there's so many people that get into weird charismatic flakiness. And I'm not dogging the $58 seeds and all the other things that I've heard ministers use in the past. Maybe it was anointed at that time and God used it. Is it not the exception but the rule? Whatever. Like I said, I get tired of the charismatic flakiness, and there's a lot of it. I have seen people get burnt and they walk away discouraged and they leave the church and they don't want anything to do with it because some preacher they think took their money, and they give up tithing, they give up giving. And I'm telling you, that's the devil's greatest trick: to make you think that what you gave isn't working because you gave it into bad ground—some 30, some 60, and some 100-fold. What's good ground? Quit sowing into bad ground expecting a big harvest. You're sowing into sand, bad ground, rocky ground, a lot of you, and you're going, "Why is this ground not producing?" Well, a farmer has enough sense not to keep sowing there. But the body of Christ seems to be kind of dumb—excuse it—and they keep sowing there going, "What's wrong with my seed?" Check your soil. Where are you sowing? Whatsoever a man sows, that will he also reap. But there's a lot of stupid things that people do and they keep sowing into the rocks. Sowing into the rocks and they go, "Well, is it going to produce this time?" I'm like, "Well, no. If it didn't produce for the last six months, it isn't going to produce now." Check where you're giving and be smart and strategic with your giving. Don't give until the Holy Spirit tells you to give. Don't give out of emotion. Give being spirit-led. For those that are led by the Spirit of God are the sons and daughters of God. And He will lead you into where you're supposed to be giving. Show me, Lord, where I'm getting fed. But if you're not getting fed there, and then when you sow there and the cankerworm is eating it up, check where you're at. But if you see fruit there and people are getting saved and getting blessed and delivered and healed, then you go, "Well, there's fruit there." So then you have to check your love walk, and people don't want to do that. Well, how are you talking to your wife? How are you talking to your husband? Because faith works by love, and people don't want to hear that either. Well, you've got strife in the house all the time, so you can't always blame it on the ground. How are you treating one another? Because faith works by love, and people don't want to hear that. Do you know the Bible says that if you treat your wife like trash and you don't respect her, husbands, your prayers will be hindered? Well, why are they going to be hindered? Because you aren't treating your wife right. You know how many times I go, 'Lord, forgive me,' or 'Diana, you know what? I was snappy right there; forgive me, baby. I shouldn't have done that. I need my prayers to be heard.' I take it literally. I repent, Father. I had a bad attitude right then; I don't want my prayers being hindered. Find that scripture, baby, so they can see it with their own eyes. 'Husbands, honor your wives, or your prayers will be hindered.' I'm not quoting it exactly right, but I know it's in there. 1 Peter 3:7. Read 1 Peter 3:7; there's the scripture reference: 'Likewise, ye husbands, dwell with them with understanding, giving honor to your wife as the weaker vessel, and as being heirs together of the grace of life, that your prayers may not be hindered.' So, you want to know why some of your prayers are being hindered? How are you treating your wife? That's hard, but a little sugar makes the medicine go down. You need to know this. Why are your prayers being hindered? Check your love walk. Check how you're treating your wife. Check how you're walking in love. Love never fails. How are you doing this? How are you doing that? No, listen. You focus on your love walk, and God will take care of the rest. Wives, honor your husbands. Proverbs 31—that whole chapter is all about a virtuous woman. So ladies, be that. Husbands, be a good husband to your wives. There are all kinds of scripture references that you need for how you should be leading your family. I don't know why I got off on all that, but I'm talking about the economy. The world's economy is different than the spiritual economy. We don't abide by the world's economy; we have God's economy. And I believe in seedtime and harvest. I believe in tithing. I believe in giving. One thing I can tell you, one of the major things I learned when I worked for Mark Crowe—I'll tell his name—he taught me how to tithe. He taught me how to tithe, and I worked for him, and he would teach us how to tithe. And you know what? It changed my life forever. Changed me forever. Well, 'I don't believe in tithing.' Well, then stay broke. I know what the Bible says: 'Give, and it shall be given unto you; good measure, pressed down, shaken together, and running over.' So, wherever you're getting fed—your pastor, your church, wherever you're plugged in—test the ground. Give; bless the kingdom of God. Help them. There are people believing for this end-time harvest, and it's not going to come just by giggles and bubblegum. So, I try to help you all as much as I can with the little things because people are freaking out over what I've seen, but I refuse to participate in the world's economic system of debt and the downfall of it. Why? Because I live in a heavenly system. And I believe the righteous were never forsaken, nor their seed begging bread.
